description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wallet with a dark, likely synthetic leather exterior and visible white stitching along the edges and across the front. The wallet features a flap with a tab closure, which appears to secure the wallet shut. On the upper right corner of the front face, there is a printed or embossed inscription in Cyrillic script, adding a subtle decorative and possibly brand-related detail. The surface is smooth with a matte finish, and the stitching is evenly spaced, suggesting a well-crafted item. The wallet is slim, designed to be easily carried in a pocket or bag, and likely contains multiple compartments for cards, cash, and small personal items. No visible signs of wear or damage are present, and the overall appearance is clean and professional.
description: A slim, dark wallet with white stitching, a tab closure, and Cyrillic text on the front. The surface is smooth and matte, with a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tab closure on the right and Cyrillic text in the upper right corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wallet and the tab closure extending from the center.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tab closure on the left and Cyrillic text visible upside down.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back surface and the tab closure at the top center.
attribute_brand_logo: Cyrillic text 'БЛОКНОТ CW-0324' is printed or embossed on the upper right corner of the front face in white, but no recognizable brand logo is present.
